name: IProfilingExecutionTimeData
summary: Returns information about time spent compiling and executing nodes.

methods.name: NodeExecutionTime(Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.NodeModel)
methods.summary: Returns the amount of time spent compiling and executing a specific node. Returns null if the node was not executed during the most recent graph run.

properties.name: TotalExecutionTime
properties.summary: Returns the total amount of time spent compiling and executing nodes during the most recent graph run.
